hooks.command: bash -c 'file="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; if [[ "$file" == *PLAN.md ]]; then spec="$(dirname "$file")/SPEC.md"; tc="$(dirname "$file")/TC.md"; if [[ -f "$spec" && -f "$tc" && -f "$file" ]]; then bash "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/scripts/validate-sc-tags.sh" --spec "$spec" --tc "$tc" --plan "$file"; fi; fi'
